title: APIPA address troubleshooting
text: If endpoints receive 169.254.x.x addresses, verify DHCP scope availability, VLAN tagging, and DHCP relay IP helper configuration. Capture packets on the access switch uplink to confirm DHCP Discover and Offer exchange. Check whether rogue DHCP servers are present by auditing DHCPOFFER source MAC addresses.

title: DNS timeout troubleshooting
text: When internal DNS lookups time out, test name resolution directly against authoritative resolvers, validate firewall ACLs for UDP and TCP port 53, and inspect resolver recursion settings. If only remote sites fail, inspect WAN latency and packet drops between branch and datacenter DNS nodes.

title: VPN packet loss troubleshooting
text: For high packet loss on site-to-site VPN, compare tunnel interface error counters, MTU and MSS settings, and ISP circuit performance. Run continuous pings with DF-bit variations to find fragmentation thresholds. Review crypto engine utilization and rekey events for congestion or renegotiation spikes.

title: Wi-Fi authentication failures
text: If WPA2-Enterprise authentication fails, verify RADIUS reachability from wireless controllers, certificate validity, and NTP synchronization between controllers and identity services. Inspect RADIUS reject codes to distinguish credential issues from policy mismatches.
